discovery.run_summary: Strong risk-on tape with SMH +5.2% and tech leading on TSM/NVDA strength; energy sharply lower (-4.1% XLE) despite Iran headlines, suggesting demand-side concerns or peace-trade positioning. Heavy earnings night produced large idiosyncratic moves — PRIM's 50% collapse and TMDX's 23% drop stand out as worth deeper investigation, while ACLS/SMH-adjacent names rallied with the semi tape.

notable_index_moves: XLE -4.12% despite Iran/Hormuz headlines — counterintuitive, possibly profit-taking on prior oil rally or peace-trade positioning

discoveries.name: Primoris Services Corporation
discoveries.mechanism: Earnings 8-K combined with officer departure (5.02) — combination of bad earnings and management change is typically severe, but a -50% move on a $5.5B engineering & construction name is extreme and may be overdone if the 5.02 is a planned succession rather than a forced exit
discoveries.catalyst_evidence: 8-K contains items 2.02 (earnings), 5.02 (officer departure), 5.07, 8.01 — multi-item filing on the same day suggests material adverse events stacked
research_pointers: Read the 8-K to determine: was there a guidance cut, project write-down, or accounting issue?
Identify which officer departed and circumstances (CEO/CFO mid-quarter exit is far worse than retirement)
Check backlog disclosures — Primoris is heavily exposed to utility/renewables construction
Compare to peer MTZ, MYRG, EME reactions — is this idiosyncratic or sector?
5-day move of -39% means much of the damage preceded today; check for pre-announcement or leak
discoveries.what_would_falsify: If the 8-K reveals an ordinary earnings miss with a planned executive transition, -50% is overdone; if it reveals a 4.02-style accounting issue or major project loss not yet quantified, the move may be justified or insufficient

discoveries.name: TransMedics Group
discoveries.mechanism: Earnings-driven gap on a high-multiple medical device growth story; TMDX has a history of large post-earnings moves in both directions due to lumpy organ-transport revenue
discoveries.catalyst_evidence: Single 8-K with 2.02 earnings — no ancillary items, suggests pure earnings reaction
research_pointers: Check organ volume growth (heart/liver/lung) vs prior quarter sequential
Review aviation segment (NOP) economics and utilization
Compare guidance to consensus — TMDX has been volatile on guide-down vs print-beat dynamics
Stock was already weak entering print (5-day -26%), so expectations were low — suggests guidance was the issue
discoveries.what_would_falsify: If guidance was reaffirmed and the print itself was solid, -23% would be overdone; a meaningful FY guide cut justifies the move

discoveries.name: Kyndryl Holdings
discoveries.mechanism: Earnings + restructuring charge (item 2.05) — restructuring announcement on earnings day usually signals weaker outlook or margin pressure
discoveries.catalyst_evidence: 8-K has both 2.02 (earnings) and 2.05 (costs associated with exit/disposal) — restructuring on earnings day is a clear bearish signal
research_pointers: Quantify the restructuring charge size and which segments
Check if FCF guidance was maintained — KD's bull case is FCF inflection
Read management commentary on signings/book-to-bill
discoveries.what_would_falsify: If restructuring is forward-margin-accretive and signings remained strong, -11% may be overdone

discoveries.name: GEO Group
discoveries.mechanism: Earnings beat likely combined with policy tailwind narrative around immigration detention — political beta stock
discoveries.catalyst_evidence: Clean 2.02 earnings 8-K; +20% on a $3B name with 3.3x volume suggests material beat or contract guidance
research_pointers: Check ICE detention contract pipeline disclosures
Compare to peer CXW (CoreCivic) reaction
Review EBITDA guidance change vs prior
Watch for political headline risk that could reverse sharply
discoveries.what_would_falsify: If beat was driven by one-time items rather than contract wins, sustained move unlikely

discoveries.name: Elanco Animal Health
discoveries.mechanism: Earnings beat on a turnaround story — ELAN has been working through deleveraging and pet health product launches (Credelio Quattro, Zenrelia)
discoveries.catalyst_evidence: Clean 2.02; 5-day +20% with continuation suggests genuine fundamental shift
research_pointers: Pet health product launch trajectory and US Farm Animal trends
Net debt reduction progress
Guidance revision magnitude
discoveries.what_would_falsify: If guidance only nudged and beat was FX-driven, gains may fade

discoveries.name: California Resources
discoveries.mechanism: Earnings combined with sector-wide energy selloff (XLE -4.1%) — double headwind from idiosyncratic print and sector
research_pointers: Separate the company-specific damage from XLE beta — CRK also down 13.5% on earnings, suggesting sector pressure compounding
Carbon TerraVault / CCS project updates
Hedging book and FCF guidance
discoveries.what_would_falsify: If XLE rebounds and CRC underperforms, idiosyncratic story is worse than appears; if CRC rebounds with sector, sympathy component dominated

discoveries.name: Axcelis Technologies
discoveries.mechanism: Pre-earnings rally into 5/7 print riding the SMH +5.2% wave — TSM/NVDA strength and semi-cap optimism lifting all boats; but +22% pre-print is substantial positioning risk
discoveries.catalyst_evidence: Only filing is a 5.07 (annual meeting vote), not material; upcoming_earnings shows print today AH — this is positioning
research_pointers: ACLS exposure to memory/power-discrete ion implant, not AI compute directly — verify the AI thesis applies
China revenue exposure and any guidance on it
Bar is now very high going into print — high reversal risk regardless of fundamental outcome
discoveries.what_would_falsify: An in-line print without a beat-and-raise will likely cause sharp give-back given +28% 5-day run; a clean beat with 2026 raise sustains it

discoveries.name: Freshpet
discoveries.mechanism: Earnings disappointment continuing 5-day -17% slide — growth deceleration narrative for the high-multiple pet food story
research_pointers: Household penetration growth — the key growth metric
Guidance revision magnitude and whether multi-year algorithm changed
Compare to broader pet category trends
discoveries.what_would_falsify: If guidance was maintained and weakness is one-quarter weather/promotional, -17% 5-day is overdone

discoveries.name: Clean Harbors
discoveries.mechanism: Earnings miss/guide-down on a quality industrial compounder — these names rarely give 8% on benign news, so there's likely a real issue
research_pointers: Environmental Services pricing and volumes
Safety-Kleen Sustainability Solutions base oil margins
Kimberly-Clark deal integration commentary
Quality compounder pullback may be opportunity if thesis intact
discoveries.what_would_falsify: If guidance reaffirmed and Q1 weakness was timing/weather, -8% likely overdone for this quality of business

catalyst_chains.primary_event: Semiconductor rally led by TSM +6.36% and NVDA +5.77%, SMH +5.18%
Energy sector decline -4.12% despite Iran headlines

discovery.no_signals_note: Heavy earnings night with multiple large idiosyncratic moves; PRIM warrants the deepest investigation given the magnitude (-50%) and combination of earnings + officer departure. No Trump posts to analyze. Energy sector down despite Iran-supportive headlines is the most macro-anomalous signal worth watching.

ai_analysis.no_signals_note: Today's AI news is largely commentary/macro (Milken panel, Diller on Altman, xAI as neocloud, DeepSeek valuation, Samsung $1T) plus deal/legal items (Snap-Perplexity wind-down, Apple Siri settlement) and infrastructure (SpaceX Terafab proposal). None of these map cleanly onto the stocks in the provided market data movers list, all of which are moving on idiosyncratic earnings catalysts (8-K item 2.02 filings) rather than AI announcements. PRIM -50%, TMDX -23%, CC -15%, ANDE -14%, CRC -12%, CLH -8%, FRPT -9%, CE -10%, KD -11% all have same-day or prior-day earnings filings; ACLS, TGTX, KMT, LIVN, ELAN, KAI, MRCY, LTH, IPGP gains likewise tied to earnings. GEO +21% appears policy/earnings-driven, not AI. No credible AI-narrative-to-stock-move linkage to flag. Kyndryl (KD) selloff with restructuring 8-K could superficially be misread as AI-services disruption (sympathy with Match Group AI cost commentary or IT services AI fears), but the 2.05 impairment/restructuring filing is the proximate cause — not flagging without stronger evidence of AI-narrative sympathy selling.
